title: Twins A Split Bill
description: Shows are the 14th, 15th and 16th May at 7.30pm at The Southern Belle, 3 Waterloo St, Brighton and Hove, Hove BN3 1AQ This is a Stand up Comedy split bill with a twist, it is performed by Chris and Matthew Ali who are twins. We are spitting images of each other with one twin who is straight and one who is gay. We both started stand up comedy at the same time 4 years ago and have been honing our craft independently and are now coming together to bring one show. We will be doing a set each of our own stand up material and a section where we will be doing a double act and interacting with the audience. It's a unique show brough by two people who look the same but couldn't be more different
